allow: Bash(printf '\\n/* Breadcrumb */\\n.breadcrumb {\\n  display: flex;\\n  align-items: center;\\n  gap: 8px;\\n  font-size: 0.82rem;\\n  color: var\(--muted\);\\n  margin-bottom: 32px;\\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\\n}\\n.breadcrumb a {\\n  color: var\(--muted\);\\n  transition: color 0.2s;\\n}\\n.breadcrumb a:hover { color: var\(--green\); }\\n.breadcrumb-sep { color: var\(--border\); font-size: 1rem; }\\n.breadcrumb-current { color: var\(--text\); font-weight: 500; }\\n')
